design_philosophy: Objective, rigid, and highly functional dashboard. Color exists strictly as a functional element to guide action or indicate status. 95% of the UI must be monochrome, embodying 'The Control Room' aesthetic.

fonts.name: Outfit
fonts.usage: Primary font for all headings, subheadings, and UI body text. Exploit radical weight contrasts (e.g., font-light next to font-black) to build hierarchy.

fonts.name: JetBrains Mono
fonts.usage: Exclusively used for File paths, API routes, environment variables, technical terms, and component tags.

spacing_and_layout.container: w-full max-w-[1600px] mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6
spacing_and_layout.spacing_scale: Use generous padding inside containers (p-6 or p-8) to ensure breathing room.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Strict left-alignment for dense content, tables, and lists.

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200 shadow-sm z-50 sticky top-0.
surface_strategies.dashboard_widgets: Flat, solid white or off-white surfaces with a sharp 1px border (border-slate-200). Avoid rounded corners entirely or use minimal radius (rounded-sm max). No soft diffuse shadows—use solid colored offset shadows or crisp drop-shadows on hover.
surface_strategies.code_blocks: Retro-Futurism Terminal: Deep black background (#0A0B0D) with high-contrast text (e.g., green/white). Includes scanlines or minimal styling.

components_and_sections.name: Header Navigation
components_and_sections.description: Sticky nav displaying 'CommunityPulse' scaffold dashboard title. Use radical font contrast (e.g., 'Community' in font-light, 'Pulse' in font-black). Includes 'Deploy Scaffold' mock CTA.
components_and_sections.implementation: Pure HTML/Tailwind. Ensure data-testid on links.

components_and_sections.name: Architecture Overview Hero
components_and_sections.description: Spans the full grid (col-span-full). Displays a high-level summary of the scaffold. Integrates the 'black and white network of dots' image as a heavily faded background (opacity-10).
components_and_sections.implementation: Pure HTML/Tailwind container with absolute positioning for the image.

components_and_sections.name: File Tree Viewer
components_and_sections.description: A sidebar-like block spanning col-span-1 row-span-2. Visualizes the monorepo folder structure using folder/file icons and monospace font.
components_and_sections.implementation: Custom recursive list component using Tailwind and Phosphor/Lucide icons.

components_and_sections.name: Technology Stack Cards
components_and_sections.description: A grid of small cards for FastAPI, Flutter, Google ADK, Firestore, BigQuery, Superset. Stark aesthetic, monochrome icons with slight hover pop.
components_and_sections.implementation: Shadcn Card or pure div. Keep it cardless/rectangular.

components_and_sections.name: Agent Pipeline Stages
components_and_sections.description: Visualizes NeedsClassifier -> DeduplicationAgent -> PriorityRanker -> VolunteerMatcher. Display as a horizontal or vertical flowchart with connecting lines.
components_and_sections.implementation: CSS grids/flexbox with arrow icons between nodes. High-contrast border blocks.

components_and_sections.name: API Routes
components_and_sections.description: A highly structured table listing endpoints. Methods (GET/POST) are highlighted using crisp, colored rectangular badges.
components_and_sections.implementation: Shadcn Table + Custom Badge styling (sharp edges).

components_and_sections.name: Pydantic Models Overview
components_and_sections.description: A dense list or accordion showing schema models (e.g., VolunteerProfile, CommunityNeed).
components_and_sections.implementation: Shadcn Accordion customized to look technical and sharp.

components_and_sections.name: Environment Variables Summary
components_and_sections.description: A terminal-style UI block summarizing .env variables necessary for the scaffold. Col-span-full or half.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Interactive elements should not just change color. Cards should lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and cast a sharp, 1px solid offset shadow (e.g., shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0B0D]).

media_and_icons.icon_style: Use the 'regular' or 'bold' weight for Phosphor icons to maintain the technical, dense look.

images.description: Black and white network of dots
images.instructions: Use as a subtle texture overlay (opacity: 0.05 - 0.1) inside the main architecture overview block.
Use with heavy CSS grayscale filters if utilized in a 'Mission/Context' card to ensure it matches the high-contrast Swiss archetype.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a purely read-only dashboard. The focus is exclusively on layout, typography, and density.
NEVER use Shadcn defaults without tailoring them to the Swiss & High-Contrast archetype. Strip away soft border-radius; use sharp, 1px lines (e.g., rounded-none).
Use JetBrains Mono for all code references, file paths, and environment variable names.
Include 'data-testid' on ALL major components, cards, navigation links, and expanding elements.
Layout must adhere to 'The Control Room Grid'. Do not build loose, centered marketing layouts. Pack data tightly and align left.
DO NOT output placeholder images. Strictly use the provided image URLs.
Do NOT use Inter, Space Grotesk, Roboto, or standard sans-serifs for headings. Prioritize the designated fonts (Outfit, JetBrains Mono) with Google Fonts imports if not present.
